title: [WIP] Add support for a few missing options from buildah run

comments.body: On the plane flight back from Europe, I was adding a bunch of options needed for buildah run and buildah build.  This is how far I got,  If someone would like to take this patch over or break the patch into several smaller patches, that would be welcome.
I currently commented out support for seccomp, since this will be much more complicated.

@umohnani8 there are a number of trello cards set up for these.  Please grab any that you're going to work on.  I'm on most at the moment, but am not actively working them, I probably should remove myself from them.

Also I'd suggest doing smaller patches and we'll need to also update "podman build".
@TomSweeneyRedHat yeah, I plan to break this into smaller patches. And will add myself to the trello cards. Thanks for the info :)
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably #446) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
Closing since @umohnani8 has taken it over.
